para_trans: Promoted to Tehsildar cadre
Regarding the appointment of...
Mr. Sanjeev Mundhe, Tehsildar
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. SANKINA-2026 / P.No.19 / AASTA-3
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai 400 032
Date: April 6, 2026
Reference: - 1) Government Order, serial number, d. 27.02.2026
2) General Administration Department, Notification No. SRV-2021 / Q. No.49 / Work-12, D. 14.07.2021
Government Orders: -
Reference No. 1 By order of the Government herein, Mr. Sanjeev Mundhe, Naib Tehsildar Group-B
(Pay Scale S-14 Rs. 38600-122800) to Tehsildar Group-A (Pay Scale S-19-
Rs. 55100-175100) in this category subject to the terms and conditions mentioned in the said order.
Ad-hoc promotion has been given only on a temporary basis.
Direct service in Maharashtra Government Group-A and Group-B (Gazetted and Non-Gazetted) posts and
Taking into account the provisions of the Revenue Department Allocation Rules, 2021 for appointment by promotion
Revenue Division Allocation to Mr. Sanjeevan Mundhe, Tehsildar as shown in the table below
A position is being created.
2. The said order of promotion comes into immediate effect and Mr. Sanjiv Munde has been promoted.
The position should be filled immediately.
3. Mr. Sanjeev Mundhe, Tehsildar, Government of Maharashtra Group-A and Group-B (Gazetted and
Non-Gazetted) in respect of allocation of Revenue Department for direct service and promotion to posts.
The revenue division is being allocated considering the notification.
